alkylation reagent: alkylated by 25 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min
alkylation concentration: alkylated by 25 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min
cleavage agent: digested with 125 μL trypsin solution (~10 μg trypsin)
collision energy: fragmentation by HCD using a normalized collision energy of 35
fractionation method: fractionated at three concentrations of 12.5%, 17.5%, and 50% ACN with 0.1% triethylamine from Pierce High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit
instrument: One-dimensional data dependent acquisition (DDA) LC-MS/MS (Q-Exactive, Thermo Fisher)
ionization type: The ionization source was set as positive ion mode
labeling: All samples were labeled in a 10-plex TMT label
reduction concentration: reduced by 10 mM DTT for 30 min
